variables.notes: Included 'Selling, General & Admin' because an explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview, and added populated overhead buckets 'Administrative expenses' and 'Distribution and marketing costs' for coverage. Also included 'Development costs' from outside the candidate list because the R&D interaction rule indicates separate R&D should also be included in XSGA when not already embedded in selected SG&A buckets. Manual review is needed because this requires using a non-candidate row for XSGA and because the empty SG&A row makes period coverage uncertain. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Development costs
